title: AI Chip Startup Tenstorrent Draws Takeover Interest From Intel, Qualcomm
title_en: AI Chip Startup Tenstorrent Draws Takeover Interest From Intel, Qualcomm
summary: Artificial intelligence chip startup Tenstorrent Inc. is drawing early takeover interest from prospective buyers at a moment of renewed momentum for upstarts looking to challenge Nvidia Corp. and Advanced Micro Devices Inc.
title_zh: AI Chip Startup Tenstorrent Draws Takeover Interest From Intel, Qualcomm

title: Vera Arrives: NVIDIAâs First CPU Built for Agents Lands at Top AI Labs
title_en: Vera Arrives: NVIDIAâs First CPU Built for Agents Lands at Top AI Labs
summary: The first NVIDIA Vera CPUs arrived at three of the world's leading AI labs on Friday â Anthropic in San Francisco, OpenAI in Mission Bay, SpaceXAI in Palo Alto â followed by a delivery to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure in Santa Clara on Monday. NVIDIA Vice President of Hyperscale and High-Performance Computing Ian Buck hand-delivered them.
title_zh: Vera Arrives: NVIDIAâs First CPU Built for Agents Lands at Top AI Labs

title: Nvidia Supplier SK Hynix Posts Record Profit on AI Boom
title_en: Nvidia Supplier SK Hynix Posts Record Profit on AI Boom
summary: The South Korean memory-chip maker reported record quarterly and annual results after stronger-than-expected earnings for the final quarter of 2024 on robust chip demand.
title_zh: Nvidia Supplier SK Hynix Posts Record Profit on AI Boom

title: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang at Dell Technologies World: âDemand Is Going Parabolic, Utterly Parabolicâ
title_en: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang at Dell Technologies World: âDemand Is Going Parabolic, Utterly Parabolicâ
summary: Agentic AI inference at one-tenth the cost per token with NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72. Agent sandboxes run 50% faster on NVIDIA Vera than traditional CPUs â while enterprise data queries are up to 3x faster with the Vera CPU. And 5,000 enterprises like Lilly, Samsung, and Honeywell are running AI workloads on Dell AI Factories [â¦]
title_zh: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang at Dell Technologies World: âDemand Is Going Parabolic, Utterly Parabolicâ

title: Nvidia’s CEO Sees China Opening Market to AI Chips From US
title_en: Nvidia’s CEO Sees China Opening Market to AI Chips From US
summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang, speaking days after he joined President Donald Trump’s summit in China, said he expects Chinese authorities to eventually allow the import of artificial intelligence chips from the US.
title_zh: Nvidia’s CEO Sees China Opening Market to AI Chips From US

title: Dell Scales Up the AI Supply Chain to Meet Demand
title_en: Dell Scales Up the AI Supply Chain to Meet Demand
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. Chief Executive Officer Michael Dell and Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang talk about how they work together on Dell's AI Factory which uses servers with Nvidia chips, software and services. They speak to Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow at the Dell World conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)
title_zh: Dell Scales Up the AI Supply Chain to Meet Demand

title: Google, Blackstone to Create AI Cloud Firm With In-House Chips
title_en: Google, Blackstone to Create AI Cloud Firm With In-House Chips
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google agreed to create an artificial intelligence cloud business with Blackstone Inc., aiming to compete with companies like CoreWeave Inc. in a burgeoning market.
title_zh: Google, Blackstone to Create AI Cloud Firm With In-House Chips

title: Self-Improving AI Startup Recursive AI Valued at $4.65B
title_en: Self-Improving AI Startup Recursive AI Valued at $4.65B
summary: Recursive, a startup creating AI that conducts experiments on how to safely improve itself, just came out of stealth. The company is valued at $4.65 billion, with backers including Google Ventures, Greycroft, Nvidia and AMD Ventures. Recursive CEO Richard Socher joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
title_zh: Self-Improving AI Startup Recursive AI Valued at $4.65B

title: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
title_en: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
summary: Stainless, a New York-based startup, founded in 2022, rose to prominence in the emerging AI industry for automating the creation and maintenance of software development kits, or SDKs — the libraries developers use to interact with APIs.
title_zh: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare

title: IREN CEO: Have Great Relationship With Dell and Nvidia
title_en: IREN CEO: Have Great Relationship With Dell and Nvidia
summary: IREN, a vertically integrated AI cloud provider, recently announced a strategic partnership with Nvidia for up to $2.1 billion as part of a broader agreement between the two companies aimed at accelerating the construction of AI infrastructure. IREN CEO Daniel Roberts joins Ed Ludlow on the sidelines of Dell Technologies World in Las Vegas to discuss on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
title_zh: IREN CEO: Have Great Relationship With Dell and Nvidia
